## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (incorrect or misleading content in an existing file)
- [ ] New universal rule (applies to most projects)
- [ ] New framework example (stack-specific rule under `examples/`)
- [ ] Documentation improvement (`docs/`, `README.md`)
- [ ] Template improvement (`CLAUDE.md`, memory templates, agents, commands)

## Checklist

- [ ] The change applies to most projects using Claude Code (for universal rules)
- [ ] Rule file follows the format in `.claude/rules/adding-rules.md`
- [ ] If a new rule file was added, a row was added to the rules index in `CLAUDE.md`
- [ ] If an existing rule was changed, examples are still accurate
- [ ] No project-specific business logic was added (this is a universal template)
- [ ] Token cost of the change is proportional to its value (don't bloat rule files)
